response: To make pizza dough, combine 3½ cups all-purpose flour, 1 teaspoon salt, and 2 teaspoons instant yeast in a large bowl. Stir in 1 cup warm water (about 110°F) and 2 tablespoons olive oil until a shaggy dough forms, then knead on a floured surface for 5–7 minutes until smooth and elastic. Place in an oiled bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm spot for 1–1½ hours until doubled. Punch down, divide into 2–3 balls, and let rest 15–30 minutes before rolling out.
